With a massive stat overhaul and a shiny new costume, Louhi has transformed from a dusty witch into a meta-relevant powerhouse. Is she the dispel queen your roster needs?
Costumed Louhi: The Mistress of the North Demands Your Buffs
Costumed Louhi: The "Mistress of the North" Returns with a Vengeance
, is the upgraded version of the Kalevala classic. Released alongside the 2025 Kalevala event, this costume breathes new life into the hero. Thanks to a significant

that buffed her base stats and the costume's multipliers, she has vaulted from "outdated" to "highly competitive." She retains her signature priority dispel but now packs the stats to survive and the damage to sting.

The "Mistress of the North" costume gives Louhi a glow-up—or perhaps a "glow-down" into something more menacing. Gone are the drab rags; she now sports vibrant purple plumage and a more regal, terrifying presence. The art screams "Dark Sorceress" rather than "Swamp Witch." It’s a fantastic reimagining that keeps her monstrous features but adds a layer of dark majesty.

Family Bonus, Passives, Aether Power & Unique Abilities
The Kalevala bonus provides damage reduction from Holy sources. This makes Costumed Louhi an absolute tank against yellow stacks.

Louhi was always "good but stats were low." The costume and the 2025 update fixed her only real weakness.
With 1220 Power, she is right in the mix with current heroes. She outstats almost all "Classic" costumes and competes with recent Construct/Astral heroes in terms of raw numbers.

She is a premier purple option for wars and raids. The combination of modern stats + Priority Dispel + Defense Down is rare and valuable. She counters the heavy-buff meta (Taunt, Dodge, Growth) exceptionally well.

Costumed Louhi is the definition of a "redemption arc." From a dusty shelf-warmer to a stat-monster with a premium skill set, she is back in the meta. Priority Dispel is a mechanic that never ages, and now that she has the body of a 2026 hero to go with her 2022 brain, she is a force to be reckoned with.
A comprehensive review of Costumed Louhi (Mistress of the North). We analyze her updated stats, priority dispel mechanics, and why she is a top-tier utility hero in the current meta.
